mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_follow_ups WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND progress = '课程' AND intent = '很稳' AND updated_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND (inviter_user_id = #{userId} OR owner_user_id = #{userId})
